_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Creating a random unrelated notes partial for note pages. It excludes the current page from the pool, mirroring the blog partial pattern.

Writing the JavaScript file adapted from the blog script. It targets `data-notes-single-random-*` selectors. The Hugo template will filter out the current page URL from the note pool.

Replacing the blog context function with a note-specific version. The prompt will reference the current note plus two random unrelated notes. Meta pages and graph pages may need to skip this section since they use separate layouts.

Meta notes will be included in the random pool rather than excluded. The random notes partial will be placed directly after the related posts section in the notes single template.

Reusing the existing blog AI chat parameter for notes instead of adding a separate notes section. The random notes partial will sit directly after the related-posts partial, which already renders full-width inside the container.

The JavaScript will read the current note title and content from the main article element. Prompt variants will cover all three notes together, the current note plus one random, and the current note plus another random. The current page URL will be passed from the Hugo template and excluded from every random selection.

The Hugo template will inject a JSON script tag containing the note pool, current URL, and AI chat URL. The existing blog lede text will be reused for the notes section without adding new i18n keys.

Fetched note pages will not nest the random section. The parser selects only article and notes-content elements, and cloneArticleBody skips extra markup.

The random section sits outside the article in the notes single template, so fetched pages cannot nest it. The partial will only render when the filtered pool contains at least two notes, matching the blog minimum.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

Blog posts already have this pattern; I'll add the same "2 Random Notes" section to note single pages, excluding the current note from the pool.

_**Agent (default)**_

Added a **2 Random Notes** section at the bottom of every note page, matching the pattern already used on blog posts.

**What was added:**

1. **`layouts/_partials/notes/random-unrelated-notes.html`** — shuffle controls, AI prompt panel, and two note slots. The current note is excluded from the pool.

2. **`assets/js/notes-single-random-notes.js`** — loads random note bodies, handles shuffling, and builds an AI prompt that includes the current note plus the two random picks.

3. **`layouts/notes/single.html`** — includes the partial after related posts.

It appears when at least one other note exists in the garden. Shuffle all/left/right work the same way as on blog posts, and the AI prompt covers combinations of the current note with the random pair.
